title: Living in Boulder Vlog 2 - 26 - 2017: Melting Glaciers in Background

enrichment.summary: Kyle records a late-night vlog from Boulder, discussing the glaciers visible from the city as natural indicators of global warming, noting their dramatic shrinkage over the years. He also recaps his day: sleeping in, working on a 'battles' page for his website, fixing misaligned ads on his site, and dealing with real-life tasks like picking up his car, Medicaid paperwork, and considering a solar car video.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Boulder's glaciers are a perfect natural barometer for global warming — he's watched them shrink dramatically over his lifetime
Resolution is improving rapidly and will soon look like a real photograph, which he finds exciting and beautiful

claims.subject: Glaciers
claims.claim: Glaciers are the perfect natural barometer for showing global warming because every year the glacier is melting.

claims.subject: Boulder
claims.claim: Out of around 20 glaciers in the lower 48, about 14 of them are right outside of Boulder.

claims.subject: St. Mary's Glacier
claims.claim: St. Mary's Glacier used to be big and wide, but now it's just a tiny little sliver.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle remembers skiing at St. Mary's Glacier and seeing how much it has shrunk over time.

claims.subject: Battles
claims.claim: There are about three thousand battles recorded in history, which is the same amount as pages in the Bible or miles across America.

claims.subject: Moses
claims.claim: Moses lived around the same time as the Trojan War, which was the first story from long ago.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle fixed the ads on his website after they were initially screwed up due to changes in ad formats.

claims.subject: Google Earth
claims.claim: Google Earth's resolution is getting better and better, almost like a photograph, and soon it will be as clear as a fun photograph on Earth.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle is working on his website and finds it exciting how fast things are coming together with his new computer.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle needs to send in paperwork to prove his eligibility for Medicaid.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle is trying to set up his car and find his paperwork, possibly for a solar car project.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle's mom suggested he might just stop working on certain projects, but he finds it exciting and wants to continue.
